description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a manicured lawn and bordered by two large, leafy trees at the front. The structure features clean, white exterior walls and a prominent front entrance accessed by a short set of steps. The property is enclosed by low boundary walls, with green grass strips running along both sides and a paved driveway or walkway at the front. The rear of the bungalow includes a small, private garden area, while the sides are lined with narrow green spaces. Windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern, providing natural light to the interior. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing open outdoor space and a streamlined architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, front steps, and landscaped green areas bordered by two large trees. The design is minimalist with clean lines and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance steps, two large trees, and the landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated rectangular shape, flat roof, and linear window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the private garden area and the back of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the boundary wall, green strips, and the rear garden space.
